texto: The freedom to talk with God and of God is being opened by God's joy. It cannot be forced. For true awareness cannot be coercive
autor: it does not come about by either authoritarian pressure or the force of logic. It presupposes liberty. Being aware of God is an art and--if the term may be permitted--a noble game.
